SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing. No appeace by Defendant(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Howard Olsen, Esq., for the Plaintiff MIKE PATEL dba FRANCES HOTEL.
Plaintiff Mike Patel sworn and examined on his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant EVAN CHRISTOPHER KYLE, aka CHRISTOPHER KYLE EVANS.
Defendants Does 1-10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2084 Mission Street, San Francisco, California 94110.
Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $0.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $0.00
Judgment for Possessioin only.
Judgment signed in open court.
